summary: Iteration 246 - Anthropology Classes + Sovereign Treasury + Constellations Mirror Hook Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features verified working. OrbitalMixer renders with 21 orbital bubbles. Class picker shows 4 archetypes (Shaman/Nomad/Architect/Merchant). Constellation panel has Save/Mine/Community/Market tabs. Focus Mode auto-triggers at 3+ active modules. SmartDock collapses to resonance dot in focus mode. Synergy counter shows when modules share affinities. Clear All button removes active modules. Console/Playground mode toggle works correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Balance not visible in constellation panel header - may require authenticated session with zen_token in localStorage

issues: Shows 'No constellations shared yet' when empty - expected behavior but could show placeholder content

critical_code_review_comments: classes.py: Clean implementation with 4 archetypes (shaman/nomad/architect/merchant), each with boosted_affinities and synergy_bonus
classes.py line 129: XP leveling formula is 1 + xp // 100 (every 100 XP = 1 level)
treasury.py: 5% sovereign fee hardcoded at line 9 (SOVEREIGN_FEE_PERCENT = 5)
treasury.py line 11: Initial credits = 100 for new users
treasury.py line 97: Sovereign cut calculation: max(1, int(price * 5 / 100)) ensures minimum 1 credit fee
treasury.py line 159-173: Mirror hook writes purchase records to sovereign_mirror collection
constellations.py line 56-73: Mirror hook writes constellation creation to sovereign_mirror collection
OrbitalMixer.js: Well-structured with DraggableBubble, PlayerHub, RingLabel subcomponents
OrbitalMixer.js line 23: CLASS_ICONS maps class IDs to Lucide icons (Flame/Compass/PenTool/Coins)
ConstellationPanel.js line 193: Balance display uses data-testid='constellation-balance'
FocusContext.js line 23: Auto-trigger at 3+ active modules, hyper-focus at 5+
SmartDock.js line 252-300: Resonance dot collapse when focusMode is true
seed_data_creation: Test constellations created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 246 verified: (1) Classes API fully working - GET /api/classes/archetypes returns 4 classes, POST /api/classes/select assigns class, GET /api/classes/mine returns user's class, POST /api/classes/xp adds XP and levels up. (2) Treasury API fully working - GET /api/treasury/balance returns wallet (initial 100 credits), GET /api/treasury/ledger returns transactions, POST /api/treasury/purchase validates constellation and handles fee split, GET /api/treasury/sovereign/dashboard returns treasury stats with 5% fee. (3) Constellations mirror hook writes to sovereign_mirror collection on creation. (4) Frontend OrbitalMixer renders with 21 bubbles in Playground mode. (5) Class picker (data-testid='class-picker') shows 4 options with icons. (6) Constellation panel has 4 tabs. (7) Focus Mode auto-triggers at 3+ modules. (8) SmartDock collapses to resonance dot (data-testid='dock-resonance-dot'). (9) Synergy counter shows when modules share affinities. (10) Console/Playground toggle works. Note: Marketplace tab shows empty state when no for-sale constellations exist. Balance display requires authenticated session.

backend_classes_archetypes.details: GET /api/classes/archetypes returns 4 class definitions with boosted_affinities and synergy_bonus

backend_classes_select.details: POST /api/classes/select assigns class to user, returns class_id and class_data

backend_classes_mine.details: GET /api/classes/mine returns user's current class with xp and level

backend_classes_xp.details: POST /api/classes/xp adds XP and levels up correctly (1 + xp // 100)

backend_treasury_balance.details: GET /api/treasury/balance returns wallet with balance, total_earned, total_spent

backend_treasury_purchase.details: POST /api/treasury/purchase validates constellation, rejects non-for-sale items

backend_treasury_sovereign_dashboard.details: GET /api/treasury/sovereign/dashboard returns treasury stats with 5% fee

frontend_orbital_mixer_renders.details: OrbitalMixer renders with 21 orbital bubbles in Playground mode

frontend_class_picker_4_archetypes.details: Class picker shows 4 archetypes (Shaman/Nomad/Architect/Merchant) with icons

frontend_class_badge.details: Class badge shows selected class name and icon

frontend_harmony_credits_balance.details: Balance display exists but requires authenticated session to show

frontend_marketplace_buy_button.details: Marketplace tab renders correctly, shows empty state when no for-sale items

frontend_focus_mode_auto_trigger.details: Focus Mode auto-triggers at 3+ active modules (body gets cosmic-focus-mode class)

frontend_smartdock_resonance_dot.details: SmartDock collapses to resonance dot in focus mode

frontend_synergy_counter.details: Synergy counter shows '3 synergies' when modules share affinities

frontend_clear_all_button.details: Clear All button removes all active modules
